title: Dietary Guidelines for Chronic Kidney Disease Management
summary: This guideline provides recommendations for managing the diet of patients with chronic kidney disease (CKD) Stage 5 on haemodialysis. It details the nutritional review process, target nutritional goals, and dietary restrictions, including sodium, potassium, phosphorus, and protein management. The document aims to guide the renal multidisciplinary team in providing appropriate nutritional care to these patients.
